Today I will be using a technique called dot density mapping to see where different people live in Los Angeles and comparing this to pollution data from the EPA to see if who is affected by different types of pollution https://t.co/vfTzFJ866E

💻 Tools: QGIS, Numbers
🕐 ~1hr
